name: Square Woven Grid Pillow Navy/Burgundy - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add a classic touch to your space with the Square Woven Grid Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This square pillow showcases a woven grid pattern in burgundy and navy hues for a beautiful look. Made with a 100% cotton exterior and polyester filling, this woven pillow feels soft and comfortable as you rest. The hidden zipper helps create a finished look, while the removable cover allows for easy maintenance.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
